issue_summary: Remove explicit field array Rework resolve
javadoc_before:
/**
     * Constructs a TimeOfDay with specified time field values and chronology.
     * 
     *
     * @param hourOfDay  the hour of the day
     * @param minuteOfHour  the minute of the hour
     * @param secondOfMinute  the second of the minute
     * @param millisOfSecond  the millisecond of the second
     * @param chronology  the chronology, null means ISOChronology in the default zone
     */
javadoc_after:
/** * Constructs a TimeOfDay with specified time field values and chronology. *

* The constructor uses the time zone of the chronology specified. * Once the constructor is complete, all further calculations are performed * without reference to a timezone (by switching to UTC). * * @param hourOfDay the hour of the day * @param minuteOfHour the minute of the hour * @param secondOfMinute the second of the minute * @param millisOfSecond the millisecond of the second * @param chronology the chronology, null means ISOChronology in the default zone */
